PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IGAFO, JOSHUAA IGAFO, REBEKAH O. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MV TRANSPORTATION MILLER, MARVIN E. $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,250.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR-- DEFTS TO PAY $250 TO JOSHUA IGAFO AND $6000 TO REBEKAH IGAFO STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
